race.comment: RAGING MONKEY (3) finished eighth two runs back then did well last start but found one better over 1000m at Echuca, beaten only a long neck after being in the firing line on the turn. Finds a very winnable affair and has run well enough here in the past. PRINCE MARIONETTE (1) was out of the money two runs back then again missed the frame last start over 1000m at this track, beaten 4.5 lengths into fifth. This is easier again and he maps for every hope. THE LAST JUDGEMENT (7) fought on well for second last start over 1000m at Donald, making it two minor placings in a row. First go synthetic but should be competitive. LONGREACH DROVER (13) recorded his maiden success three back but has missed the placings at the last two appearances. In the mix on best.
